lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [long pause] Do you want coffee? I'm making a pot.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [long pause] [enthusiastic] Yes please, I've been up since five.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [long pause] The neighbours were having some kind of argument. [tired] Through the wall.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [long pause] [sympathetic] That's rough. Black or milk?
